Expert Kubernetes
& GitOps Consulting
hero.subtitle: Production incidents, scaling bottlenecks, GitOps growing pains. I help engineering teams get Kubernetes and Argo CD under control.
services.heading: What I Offer
services.subtitle: Four focused service offerings built around Kubernetes and Argo CD, the tools your team relies on.
services.training_desc: New to Kubernetes, or need your team to level up on GitOps? Private 1:1 coaching and group workshops covering fundamentals through advanced operations with Argo CD.
services.review_desc: Not sure your clusters or GitOps setup will hold up at scale? In-depth assessments delivered as written reports with prioritized, actionable recommendations.
services.support_desc: Pods crashing, syncs failing, or stuck on an issue that won't stay fixed? On-demand help available ad-hoc or on a monthly retainer.
services.embedded_desc: Need ongoing Kubernetes expertise without a full-time hire? I embed directly in your team on a flexible monthly retainer, working alongside your engineers.
remote.heading: Built for Remote Teams
remote.p1: Effective Kubernetes and GitOps consulting doesn't require being in the same building. It requires the right expertise and clear communication.
remote.p2: Whether your team is distributed across time zones or co-located, I can collaborate synchronously via video call or asynchronously through your existing tooling.
remote.bullet1: Based in EST (UTC−5), aligned with North and South American business hours.
remote.bullet2: Will work within whatever tools your team already uses: Slack, Teams, Jira, GitHub, or anything else.
remote.bullet3: No lengthy onboarding required. I can get up to speed on your stack and contribute meaningfully from day one.
remote.bullet4: Work at the pace that fits your team: intensive project sprints, steady ongoing support, or on-demand as needed.
cta.heading: Ready to Get Started?
cta.body: Reach out to discuss your project, ask about availability, or get a quote for a specific engagement.

about.schema.description: Kubernetes and Argo CD specialist with 5+ years of experience in cloud-native infrastructure, GitOps pipelines, and Linux systems. Available for remote consulting worldwide.
about.hero.heading: About
about.hero.subheading: The background, experience, and philosophy behind Burrell Technology Services.
about.bio.intro: I'm an infrastructure and DevOps specialist focused on Kubernetes and GitOps with Argo CD. I founded Burrell Technology Services to offer engineering teams the kind of deep, hands-on expertise that typically only comes from inside a well-staffed platform engineering org, without the cost or overhead of a full-time hire.
about.bio.akuity: My experience includes time as a Senior Technical Support Engineer at Akuity, the company behind the leading enterprise Argo CD platform, founded by Argo CD's original creators. Working directly with engineering teams across the industry to diagnose complex Argo CD and GitOps problems in production gave me broad visibility into real-world GitOps architectures at scale: the patterns that hold up and the ones that don't. That informs everything I bring to consulting engagements.
about.bio.industry: I've also spent several years working across insurance, telecom, and research environments, building and operating Kubernetes clusters, implementing GitOps workflows, designing network infrastructure, and automating the operational work that keeps platforms running reliably.
about.bio.location: I'm based in Panama City, Panama and work exclusively with clients remotely. Panama runs on Eastern Standard Time (UTC−5) year-round, which puts me well-aligned with North and South American teams. I'm a native English speaker and can collaborate through whatever tools your team already uses: Slack, Jira, GitHub, GitLab, or otherwise.
about.bio.goal: My goal with every engagement is to leave your team better off than I found it, whether that means resolving a specific problem, building something new, or transferring enough knowledge that you don't need me to come back for the same issue twice.
about.glance.heading: At a Glance
about.work.heading: What I Work On
about.work.p1: My work centers on Kubernetes operations and GitOps delivery, with deep expertise in Argo CD and the broader cloud-native ecosystem. I help teams deploy reliably, troubleshoot complex platform failures, and build sustainable operational practices, whether they are getting started with Kubernetes or running it at enterprise scale.
about.work.p2: On the infrastructure side, I bring hands-on experience with bare-metal cluster provisioning, networking, storage, secrets management, and the full range of tooling that keeps a platform running in production.
about.experience.heading: Work Experience
about.experience.akuity.title: Senior Technical Support Engineer
about.experience.akuity.description: Enterprise-level support engineering for Akuity's SaaS Argo CD and Kargo platform, diagnosing complex GitOps issues across production environments at scale.
about.experience.empire.title: System Administrator II
about.experience.empire.description: Led a GitOps initiative from the ground up, introducing Argo CD and Kubernetes to automate software delivery across on-premise, Azure, and GKE environments.
about.cta.heading: Interested in working together?
about.cta.body: Reach out to discuss your needs or get a quote. I'm happy to have a no-commitment conversation first.

privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy - Burrell Technology Services S.A.
privacy.meta.description: Privacy policy for Burrell Technology Services S.A. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.meta.og_title: Privacy Policy - Burrell Technology Services S.A.
privacy.meta.og_description: Privacy policy for Burrell Technology Services S.A.
privacy.hero.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview.heading: Overview
privacy.overview.text: Burrell Technology Services S.A. ("we", "us") operates the website burrell.tech. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how you can control it.
privacy.data.heading: Data We Collect
privacy.data.contact.heading: Contact Form Submissions
privacy.data.contact.text: When you submit the contact form, we collect your name, email address, subject, and message. This data is used solely to respond to your inquiry. We do not share it with third parties or use it for marketing purposes.
privacy.data.analytics.heading: Analytics (Google Analytics)
privacy.data.analytics.text1_before: With your consent, we use Google Analytics (measurement ID: G-BCFH7EJYP0) to understand how visitors use the site. Google Analytics sets cookies (such as
privacy.data.analytics.text1_after: ) to distinguish unique visitors and track page views. This data is aggregated and anonymous.
privacy.data.analytics.text2: Analytics cookies are not loaded unless you click "Accept" on the cookie consent banner. If you decline, no analytics cookies are set and no data is sent to Google.
privacy.data.storage.heading: Local Storage
privacy.data.storage.text: We store two preferences in your browser's local storage:
privacy.data.storage.item_consent: Whether you accepted or declined analytics cookies
privacy.data.storage.note: These are functional preferences stored only in your browser. They do not contain personal information and are not transmitted to any server.
privacy.data.cloudflare.heading: Cloudflare
privacy.data.cloudflare.text1: All traffic to this site is routed through Cloudflare, which acts as a reverse proxy and content delivery network (CDN). In the course of proxying requests, Cloudflare may process your IP address, browser user-agent, and other request headers for the purposes of delivering content, caching assets, and protecting the site from malicious traffic. Cloudflare does not set any cookies on this site.
privacy.data.cloudflare.text2: We also use Cloudflare Web Analytics to collect aggregated, privacy-focused usage statistics. Unlike Google Analytics, Cloudflare Web Analytics does not use cookies and does not track individual visitors across sites.
privacy.thirdparty.heading: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdparty.cloudflare: Reverse proxy, CDN, and privacy-focused web analytics. Processes request-level data (IP address, headers) to deliver and protect the site. No cookies are set.
privacy.thirdparty.google: Used for aggregated, anonymous site usage statistics (only with your consent).
privacy.thirdparty.alpine: Loaded from a CDN (jsDelivr) for interactive page elements. No data is collected by this library.
privacy.retention.heading: Data Retention
privacy.retention.text: Contact form submissions are retained only as long as necessary to respond to and follow up on your inquiry. Google Analytics data is retained according to Google's default retention settings (14 months).
privacy.rights.heading: Your Rights
privacy.rights.item1: Decline analytics cookies via the consent banner
privacy.rights.item2: Request access to any personal data we hold about you
privacy.rights.item3: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy.rights.item4: Withdraw consent at any time by clearing your browser's local storage and cookies
privacy.rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
privacy.contact.heading: Contact
privacy.contact.text: For questions about this privacy policy, contact:
svc.meta.title: Kubernetes & Argo CD Consulting Services & Pricing — Burrell Technology Services S.A.
svc.meta.description: Kubernetes and Argo CD consulting services with transparent pricing: 1:1 training from $125/hr, cluster assessments from $850, troubleshooting support retainers, and embedded team services from $1,250/mo.
svc.meta.keywords: Kubernetes consulting pricing, Argo CD consulting services, GitOps consulting, Kubernetes training cost, Kubernetes assessment, Kubernetes support retainer, Argo CD specialist for hire, GitOps engineer, Kubernetes architect, cloud-native consulting services, Helm training, Kubernetes troubleshooting service, fractional Kubernetes engineer
svc.meta.og_title: Kubernetes & Argo CD Consulting Services & Pricing — Burrell Technology Services S.A.
svc.meta.og_description: Transparent pricing for Kubernetes and Argo CD consulting: training, architecture reviews, troubleshooting retainers, and embedded professional services.
svc.meta.twitter_title: Kubernetes & Argo CD Consulting Services & Pricing — Burrell Technology Services S.A.
svc.meta.twitter_description: Transparent pricing for Kubernetes and Argo CD consulting: training, architecture reviews, troubleshooting retainers, and embedded professional services.
svc.schema.training_desc: Private 1:1 Kubernetes coaching at $125/hr and group workshops from $900. Topics include Kubernetes architecture, Argo CD setup, GitOps workflows, Helm, RBAC, networking, and secrets management.
svc.schema.review_desc: Expert review of your Kubernetes cluster configuration, RBAC, networking, storage, and Argo CD GitOps pipelines. Delivered as a written report with prioritized recommendations.
svc.schema.support_desc: On-demand Kubernetes and Argo CD troubleshooting for production incidents, pod crashes, networking issues, sync failures, and cluster upgrades. Available ad-hoc or on a monthly retainer.
svc.schema.embedded_desc: Fractional Kubernetes and GitOps engineer embedded in your team on a monthly retainer. Participates in standups, reviews PRs, architects solutions, and handles day-to-day infrastructure work.
svc.hero.heading: Services & Pricing
svc.hero.subtitle: All engagements are delivered remotely. Pricing is transparent and in USD. Contact me to discuss your specific needs or to get a custom quote.
svc.training.heading: Training
svc.training.desc: Structured training sessions for individuals and teams, tailored to your current skill level and infrastructure. Whether you're onboarding engineers to Kubernetes or leveling up existing staff on GitOps with Argo CD, I design each engagement around your real environment and goals.
svc.training.topics_disclaimer: Topics shown are examples only. Actual coverage is fully customized, including which topics are included, how many, and how deeply each is explored.
svc.training.full_day_feat1: Everything included in the Half Day
svc.training.custom_cta: Need a multi-day program or custom curriculum?
svc.training.custom_cta_link: Get in touch for a quote.
svc.review.heading: Review & Analysis
svc.review.desc: A structured, expert review of your existing Kubernetes and Argo CD implementation. I examine your configurations, deployment pipelines, resource management, security posture, and GitOps setup, then deliver a written report with prioritized findings and actionable recommendations.
svc.review.includes1: Live review session via video call
svc.review.includes3: Prioritized recommendations by risk and impact
svc.review.k8s_details: Up to 8 hours of review work
svc.review.argo_details: Up to 8 hours of review work
svc.review.full_details: Up to 16 hours · both reviews combined
svc.support.heading: Troubleshooting & Support
svc.support.desc: When something breaks or your team is stuck, I can help diagnose and resolve issues quickly. From intermittent pod crashes and network connectivity issues to Argo CD sync failures and cluster upgrade problems. I've seen it all. If I'm unable to identify or resolve the issue, you won't be charged for the time spent.
svc.support.disclaimer: Determinations of "unable to identify or resolve" are made solely at the consultant's discretion. Engagements ended at the client's discretion are billed for time worked.
svc.support.rates_desc: Retainer clients receive a discounted rate relative to the ad-hoc rate. Committing to a retainer with a higher monthly hour minimum results in a lower effective rate. Hours beyond your retainer minimum are billed at your retainer rate.
svc.support.standard_feat1: Guaranteed 4-hour response during EST business hours
svc.embedded.heading: Professional Services
svc.embedded.desc: Need more than occasional support? I can embed directly into your team on a monthly retainer, functioning as a fractional Kubernetes and GitOps engineer. I'll participate in standups, work tickets, review PRs, architect solutions, and handle day-to-day infrastructure work, all remotely.
svc.embedded.rates_desc: Committing to a retainer with a higher monthly hour minimum results in a lower effective rate. Hours beyond your retainer minimum are billed at your retainer rate.
svc.cta.heading: Not sure which service fits?
svc.cta.body: Send me a message and we can talk through your situation. No sales pitch. Just a straightforward conversation about whether I can help.
